message:
fix: add withTimeout to remaining unwrapped R2 reads in query-do

- Dictionary page reads (2 sites) — scan hot path, previously could
  hang indefinitely while surrounding page reads had timeout
- Lance full-file read — large fetch, no timeout guard
- HNSW index load from R2 — no timeout guard
- Column metadata read (readColumnMeta) — no timeout guard
All wrapped with withTimeout(…, R2_TIMEOUT_MS = 10s).
